name: StartEndPlacementRule
summary: Rules for linear rebar placements, determining how rebars are distributed when the placement length is not an exact multiple of the spacing

enum_values.name: AdaptDistance
enum_values.summary: Spacing is adapted to match the placement length

enum_values.name: AdditionalCover
enum_values.summary: Spacing is preserved, concrete cover is increased at both ends

enum_values.name: AdditionalCoverLeft
enum_values.summary: Spacing is preserved, concrete cover at start is increased

enum_values.name: AdditionalCoverRight
enum_values.summary: Spacing is preserved, concrete cover at end is increased
